channel.title: Hardware on Puget Audio
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware on Puget Audio

item.title: Roadie + Euro Tour Bundle
item.description: Roadie + Euro Tour Pre-order Bundle Both pedals. $25 off. Pre-order pricing. Get both Roadie (expression-pedal-to-CV) and Euro Tour (instrument-level audio translator) for $150 — $25 off the individual pre-order price of $175. What’s in the Bundle Roadie ($75 individually) — TRS expression pedal in, 0–~4V CV out Euro Tour ($100 individually) — Bidirectional pedal-level / eurorack-level audio translator Why Buy the Bundle Roadie and Euro Tour were designed as a pair: get pedalboard expression and audio into your rack with one order.

item.title: AcidBath
item.description: AcidBath TB-303 Voice A complete TB-303-style voice in Eurorack. WDF-modeled diode-ladder filter, accent circuit, slide circuit, and square/saw oscillator — all the squelch, none of the eBay tax. What It Does TB-303 voice path: VCO → diode ladder VCF → VCA Accent + slide circuits modeled at component level CV in for pitch (V/oct), gate, accent, slide Audio out at eurorack level Why It Exists 303s sound the way they sound because of how the filter, accent, and envelope interact.

item.title: Cornucopia Eurorack Case
item.description: Cornucopia Eurorack Case A Eurorack case system designed for musicians who want flexibility without compromise. Built from premium aluminum with a modular width system that grows with your setup. Base Configuration Starting at $499 Width Options Select the perfect size for your rig: 84HP — $499 Compact, portable Fits in a backpack Perfect for small systems or sub-mixers 104HP — $599 The sweet spot Room for a complete voice Most popular choice 126HP — $699

item.title: BiValve
item.description: BiValve Stereo Multi-Filter Seven legendary filter circuits, modeled circuit-accurate, in stereo. Cycle through Moog ladder, MS-20, SSM2044, Polivoks, Steiner-Parker, Wasp, and Jupiter-6 — all on one button. Filter Library Moog Ladder — LP / HP-tap MS-20 — LP / HP SSM2044 — LP / HP-tap Polivoks — LP / HP-tap Steiner-Parker — LP / HP Wasp — LP / HP Jupiter-6 — LP / HP / BP / Notch Key Features Skew knob — Offset cutoff between L/R channels for true stereo movement Stereo processing — Dual filters, independent or linked Circuit-accurate models — WDF-based, component-level precision CV control — Cutoff, resonance, and mode selection Specifications Format: Eurorack, 3U, 10HP Audio: 24-bit / 96kHz I/O: Audio in/out, CV in (1V/oct) Power: +12V: 150mA, -12V: 50mA Dealer: $199 (MAP $279) Status Pre-order open — Shipping Q4 2026.

item.title: DrummerBoy
item.description: DrummerBoy 4-Voice Drum Module A 4-voice drum module in Eurorack format. Each voice is a complete WDF circuit model — pull from a library of classic machines: 808 and 909 kicks, snares, and hats, Simmons SDS-V, LinnDrum, Oberheim DMX, plus a Reese bass voice. Voice Library Kicks: 808 Kick (bridged-T) 909 Kick LinnDrum Kick Oberheim DMX Kick Snares: 808 / 909 Snare Hats: 808 Hats 606 Hats Other: 808 Cowbell / Metallic Clap Sub Bass (V/oct) Simmons SDS-V Tom Reese Bass Specifications Format: Eurorack, 3U, 16HP Voices: 4 independent, mixable Processor: Daisy Seed · M7 @ 480MHz Display: 128×64 OLED Audio: 24-bit / 48kHz Power: +12V 200mA · −12V 80mA Dealer: $199 (MAP $249) I/O TRIG — Trigger / Gate per voice ACCENT — Per-voice accent CV OUT — Voice out (norm.

item.title: Roadie
item.description: Roadie Your expression pedal, in eurorack. Converts a standard TRS expression pedal into eurorack-compatible CV. Plug in any expression pedal, get 0–~4V CV out, scaled by the RANGE knob. What It Does Accepts standard TRS expression pedal input Outputs 0–~4V CV (eurorack standard) RANGE knob scales the output voltage Your foot now controls filter cutoffs, VCAs, anything CV-controllable Why It Exists Pedal players modulate things with their feet. Modular doesn’t speak expression pedal natively.

item.title: Euro Tour
item.description: Euro Tour Your pedalboard, in eurorack. Bidirectional audio level translator between 1/4" instrument/pedal level and 3.5mm eurorack level. Two independent unidirectional channels in one pedal-format box. What It Does Channel 1: 1/4" IN → 3.5mm OUT Gain pot amplifies pedal/instrument up to euro level Channel 2: 3.5mm IN → 1/4" OUT Attenuator pot brings euro down to pedal level Why It Exists Pedalboards and eurorack speak different audio languages. Euro Tour translates both directions in one box, no compromise.

item.title: Skiff
item.description: Skiff 4U 84HP Eurorack Skiff A low-profile 4U, 84HP eurorack skiff. Same metal construction as Cornucopia — just shorter, lighter, and ready to live on a desk or slide into a gig bag. What It Does 4U tall, 84HP wide Threaded rails, bus board pre-installed Power entry panel — pairs with the same supplies as Cornucopia Aluminum chassis, powder-coat optional Specifications Format: 4U × 84HP eurorack skiff Depth: ~TBD mm internal Bus board: 16-pin headers Power: Mounting for standard eurorack supply (sold separately) Weight: TBD Status Pre-order open — Ship date TBA.
